title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an AI video generation platform that addresses character consistency in AI films through storyboard mode, character locking, preset-based multi-shot generation, and built-in timeline editing. The platform enables end-to-end filmmaking without external software, supporting 15-second shot generation with an Extend feature for longer sequences.
